ksa_text: Knowledge of computer vision task taxonomy, including image classification, object detection, segmentation, pose estimation, and generation, and the architectures appropriate for each.

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Transparency and provision of information to deployers

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-013 (AI, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.3870 is insufficient to establish relevance to financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (dcwf=0.387, nice=0.386, ddat=0.379) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.3870 below threshold for weak fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-K-013 (composite 0.3870) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.3870 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Financial Risk Specialist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.3870 is not a standard requirement for Financial Risk Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.3870, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
